name: Patient
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research. References to a sequencing-related study and a colleague named Kelly. Working on a project with a senior scientist who has struggled to gain recognition in his career.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must work harder to be recognized and accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not doing enough compared to others.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of social situations and crowds, reliance on medication.
situation: Comparing themselves to colleagues who work longer hours and publish more papers.
auto_thought: I am not as productive or successful as my colleagues.
behavior: Withdrawal from social activities, reduced engagement in professional opportunities.
